title: Adventurous Juicy Uruguayan Ancho Chilies Stir-fry
description: A savory and adventurous dish featuring juicy uruguayan ancho chilies in a paleo-friendly, savory sauce that is perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: 1 lb pork belly, cut into bite-sized pieces
8 large uruguayan ancho chilies, stemmed and seeded

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add pork belly and cook until browned on all sides.
Remove pork from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add garlic and onion. Sauté for about 2 minutes.
Add ancho chilies to the pan. Stir-fry for another minute or two until fragrant.
Return pork belly to the pan along with any accumulated juices. Add sliced red bell pepper if using.
Pour in enough water to cover the ingredients by a few inches, then add salt and pepper to taste.
Simmer gently covered for about 10 minutes until the meat is tender.
Serve hot as a main dish or side dish.
